CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE

Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order For Writ Of Attachment
Off Calendar Dec-19-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF BIRITE RESTAURANT SUPPLY, INC.'S pplication And Hearing For Right To Attach Order For Writ Of Attachment IS Off calendar as untimely under CCP 484.040 and 1005(b). The motion was filed and served on December 1, 2013 by substituted service. Moving party did not allow for 16 court days. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Court Reporter: Tony Vaughn, CSR #6185
